Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 29}Once Fuuka's Theurgy gauge is maxed, press {f 1 3 109} to activate her Theurgy, {f 0 1 2}Oracle{f 0 1 27}, during the party's turn.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Using {f 0 1 2}Oracle{f 0 1 27} will benefit the party in battle with effects such as HP recovery, SP recovery, and stat buffs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Oracle{f 0 1 27} can be activated during any party member's turn. Try to use it when you feel the time is right.[n]{f 1 1}
